Interface IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to an operation on a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("38662EB1-A3AE-42AB-A7D6-1F87EF453B32")]
public interface IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters2 : IMosaicDatasetOperationParameters

Properties

IsDatasetReadOnly 

bool IsDatasetReadOnly { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Parameters 

IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

PrepareResults

Indicates whether the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation will be generated and made available in the Results property.

bool PrepareResults { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
